docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BLUFORD, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-24-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DEREK BLUFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURO INC IS PRESENT APPEARING IN COURT IS TODD ARMSTRONG. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.
